positive: A whimsical and stylized woodland scene featuring a group of stylized forest animals (deer, fox, bunny) gathered around a glowing, mystical crescent moon. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered. The style is a modern, elegant, linework illustration mixed with soft watercolor wash background fills. Strong silhouette contrast is key, using deep forest greens, dusty midnight blues, burnt orange, and gold accents. The light source emanates from the moon and the glowing plants, creating dramatic chiaroscuro and subtle rim lighting on the animals. High detail on the stylized elements, perfect for a print-on-demand graphic tee. Vector art quality, flat design elements combined with painterly texture.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, cartoonish, messy, low contrast, dirty background, human figures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame
